order-by.label: ORDER BY Clause
order-by.summary: Sort query results by one or more columns.

sketch-what-is-order-by.title: What is ORDER BY?
sketch-what-is-order-by.bodyMarkdown: The `ORDER BY` clause in SQL is used to sort the results of a query by one or more columns. By default, sorting is in ascending order (from smallest to largest or A to Z), but you can specify descending order as well. This helps you organize your data in a meaningful way, such as listing products by price, name, or date added.

sketch-order-by-example.title: ORDER BY Example
sketch-order-by-example.bodyMarkdown:
Suppose you want to see all products sorted by price from lowest to highest:

```sql
SELECT * FROM products
ORDER BY price;
```

To sort by price from highest to lowest, add `DESC`:

```sql
SELECT * FROM products
ORDER BY price DESC;
```

You can also sort by multiple columns. For example, to sort by category (A-Z), then by price (high to low):

```sql
SELECT * FROM products
ORDER BY category ASC, price DESC;
```

sketch-why-use-order-by.title: Why Use ORDER BY?
sketch-why-use-order-by.bodyMarkdown:
Sorting results makes it easier to analyze and find information. For example, you might want to:
- List the most expensive products first
- See which items are low in stock
- Organize products alphabetically

The `ORDER BY` clause gives you control over how your data is presented.

quiz-basic-order-by-single-choice.title: Basic ORDER BY Usage
quiz-basic-order-by-single-choice.prompt: Which SQL query lists all products sorted by price from lowest to highest?

help.concept: The ORDER BY clause sorts results by the specified column. By default, it sorts in ascending order unless DESC is specified.
help.hint_1: Look for the correct answer query that orders by price without DESC.
help.hint_2: ASC is the default, so you don't need to specify it for ascending order.

options.a: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price;
options.b: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price DESC;
options.c: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price ASC, name;
options.d: SELECT * FROM products WHERE price ORDER BY ASC;

quiz-order-by-multi-column-multi-choice.title: Sorting by Multiple Columns
quiz-order-by-multi-column-multi-choice.prompt: Which queries will sort products first by category (A-Z), then by price from highest to lowest?
quiz-order-by-multi-column-multi-choice.hint: Pay attention to the order of columns and the direction for each.

help.concept: When sorting by multiple columns, the order and direction (ASC/DESC) for each column matter. ASC is default.
help.hint_1: The first column should be category (the correct answer-Z), and price should be sorted from highest to lowest.
help.hint_2: Look for queries where category is sorted ascending and price is sorted descending.

options.a: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY category ASC, price DESC;
options.b: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price DESC, category ASC;
options.c: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY category, price DESC;
options.d: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY category DESC, price DESC;

quiz-order-by-drag-reorder.title: ORDER BY Syntax Order
quiz-order-by-drag-reorder.prompt: Arrange the parts of the SQL statement to correctly sort products by stock from lowest to highest.
quiz-order-by-drag-reorder.hint: Start with SELECT, then specify the table, then the sorting.

help.concept: A basic SQL query follows the order: SELECT, FROM, ORDER BY.
help.hint_1: The SELECT clause comes first, followed by FROM, then ORDER BY.
help.hint_2: ORDER BY always comes after FROM.

quiz-fill-blank-choice-order-by-directio.title: Choosing the Sort Direction
quiz-fill-blank-choice-order-by-directio.prompt:
Fill in the blank to sort products by name from Z to A:

SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY name ____;

help.concept: the missing term sorts results in descending order, from highest to lowest or Z to A.
help.hint_1: You use the missing term to reverse the default ascending order.
help.hint_2: ASC is for ascending, the missing term is for descending.

quiz-fill-blank-choice-order-by-directio.template: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY name ____;

quiz-code-input-order-by-date.title: Write a Query: Sort by Date
quiz-code-input-order-by-date.prompt: Write a SQL query to list all products sorted by the date they were added, with the newest products first.
quiz-code-input-order-by-date.hint: Use ORDER BY with the date column and descending order.

help.concept: To show the newest entries first, sort by the date column in descending order using ORDER BY.
help.hint_1: The column is created_at. Use DESC to get the newest dates first.
help.hint_2: ORDER BY created_at DESC will sort from newest to oldest.
